Points Source file for Amisk Lake sensibility simulations
Time is in hours since start of simulations
Data - (2) Flow (scfm); (3) Temp. (not used); (4) - Tracer Loads (DO, g/s)
Source - AC: %125 g/s, con pureza del 98%, y OTE 80% = 100 g/s
Type = -2 (Section I/O BC ); = 1 (linear   bubble plume );
     = -1 (cell injection ); = 2 (circular bubble plume );
Type     !     6     ! Type of point source and sink
NumRecs  !   400     ! Number of records to read
***********************************************************************
uEpss    !     0.50  ! Fraction of flow in Eastward  direction
uWpss    !     0.50  ! Fraction of flow in Westward  direction
vNpss    !     0.00  ! Fraction of flow in Northward direction
vSpss    !     0.00  ! Fraction of flow in Southward direction
qthresh  !     0.00  ! Threshold flows to start point source solution
***********************************************************************
idetr    !     0.50  ! Fraction that multiplies (Qdetr/dx/h) for speed at detrainment cells
labmnot  !     0.025 ! Diffuser half width (m). Semiancho de la nube de burbujas
lnot     !  1000.00  ! Diffuser length (m) - linear plume
diamm    !    1.000  ! Initial bubble diameter
alphai   !    0.110  ! Entrainment coefficient inner plume (-)
alphao   !     0.15  ! Entrainment coefficient outer plume (-)
alphaa   !     0.18  ! Entrainment coefficient from ambient (-)
lambda   !     0.70  ! Fraction of plume occupied by bubble (-) Bnot = labmnot/lambda = semiancho de la nube de agua
froudei  !     1.50  ! Froude number inner plume
froudeo  !     0.14  ! Froude number outer plume
gammap   !    1.100  !
salamb   !    235.0  ! Ambient salinity (uS/cm)
patm     !  96554.0  ! Atmospheric pressure (pascals) (mm)
k4sod    !     0.00  ! Sediment oxygen demand constant
pdt      !   180     ! No. of time steps between updates
***********************************************************************
    1.0000    200.000     0.9999    100.000    100.000
    2.0000    200.000     0.9999    100.000    100.000
    3.0000    200.000     0.9999    100.000    100.000
